title: ST Game 12: San Diego Padres at Chicago White Sox
fullText: Story byPeoria, AZ - February 19: Nick Pivetta #27 of the San Diego Padres throws during a spring training practice on February 19, 2026 in Peoria, AZ. (Photo by K.C. Alfred / The San Diego Union-Tribune via Getty Images)San Diego Padres at Chicago White Sox, March 3, 2026, 12:05 p.m. PSTWatch: NoneLocation: Camelback Ranch – Glendale, AZListen: 97.3 The FanPlease remember our Game Day thread guidelines.Don’t troll in your comments; create conversation rather than destroying itRemember Gaslamp Ball is basically a non-profanity siteOut of respect to broadcast partners who have paid to carry the game, no mentions of “alternative” (read: illegal) viewing methods are allowed in our threadsGB community, this is your thread for today’s game. Enjoy!
